events.title: MotoGP Czech Republic Grand Prix 2026
events.note: The MotoGP returns to Brno's Automotodrom for the Czech Republic Grand Prix, featuring intense racing action on the 5.403 km circuit. The event includes Moto3, Moto2, and MotoGP races, with the main MotoGP race scheduled for 14:00 CEST on Sunday, June 21. ([motorcycles.news](https://www.motorcycles.news/en/event/motogp-czech-republic-grand-prix-2026/?utm_source=openai))
events.marketing_angle: Experience the thrill of MotoGP racing at the iconic Brno circuit, a must-see event for motorsport enthusiasts.
events.why_selected: The MotoGP Czech Grand Prix is a premier event in the Czech Republic, attracting a large local audience and international viewers.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico
events.note: Czech national team match at a major world football tournament. Treat as the strongest Czech-relevant weekly sports storyline and keep visuals symbolic with no official logos, badges, player likenesses, or protected tournament identity.
events.marketing_angle: personal greeting before a big Czech national team match
events.why_selected: Czech national team match at a football World Cup must be prioritized when it falls in the target week.

events.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
events.note: Important international awareness day for thoughtful Melody4U content. Use hopeful, supportive language and avoid fearmongering, shock visuals, or graphic imagery.
events.marketing_angle: thoughtful awareness message with hope and support
events.why_selected: A main international significant day in the target week; serious topics should be handled with awareness tone, not skipped.

events.title: Memorial Day for Victims of the Communist Regime / Political Prisoners
events.note: Czech memorial day requiring calm, dignified and respectful visual language. No hype, no sensationalism, and no disturbing imagery.
events.marketing_angle: respectful remembrance for a Czech audience
events.why_selected: A major Czech memorial day in the target week; it should be included with respectful memorial tone rather than ignored.

events.title: Father's Day 2026
events.note: Father's Day is celebrated on June 22, 2026, honoring fathers and father figures with gifts, family gatherings, and special events across the Czech Republic.
events.marketing_angle: Show appreciation for fathers with special gifts and family activities on this dedicated day.
events.why_selected: Father's Day is a widely celebrated occasion in the Czech Republic, providing opportunities for family bonding and recognition of paternal roles.

events.title: Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix 2026
events.note: The Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix takes place at the Red Bull Ring in Spielberg, Austria, from June 26 to June 28, 2026. The race weekend includes practice sessions, qualifying, and the main race on Sunday, June 28. ([carlove.cz](https://www.carlove.cz/en/news/formula-1-and-motogp-within-reach-from-prague/?utm_source=openai))
events.marketing_angle: Witness the high-speed action of Formula 1 racing at the Austrian Grand Prix, a thrilling event for motorsport fans.
events.why_selected: The Austrian Grand Prix is a key event in the Formula 1 calendar, attracting a significant number of Czech fans due to its proximity.

events.title: St. John’s Day / Jan / midsummer mood
events.note: Czech seasonal and name-day friendly moment, useful as a softer secondary significant-day theme.
events.why_selected: A Czech tradition and name-day mood can support a warm Melody4U greeting if capacity remains.

events.title: MotoGP Velká cena Nizozemska – Assen
events.note: Major motorcycle racing weekend at Assen. Keep it below Formula 1 and after higher Czech-relevance items.
events.marketing_angle: weekend racing spirit for motorcycle fans
events.why_selected: MotoGP Assen is an important motorcycle racing weekend, but it should stay near the end of the editorial order. Use as backup only if there are not enough primary image topics.
